heading: Reference to chapter 1219
label: 1001 Reference to chapter 1219
text: Provisions of law relating to standards and procedures for retention and promotion of members of reserve components are set forth in chapter 1219 of this title (beginning with section 12641).
notes: Prior ProvisionsPrior sections 1001 and 1002 were renumbered sections 12641 and 12642 of this title, respectively.A prior section 1003, , , related to age limitations for reserve officers, prior to repeal by , §§ 1662(h)(3), 1691, , , 3026, eff. .act Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 104170A Stat. 79Pub.
